before_state: BLUFF — pre-existing test asserted 'Menu' → 'Settings' → 'Trackers' → 'RuTor (active)'. None of those exist in the current UI. Empirical run on CZ_API34_Phone confirmed C1-class failure.
after_state: PASSING on CZ_API34_Phone (API 34). Test drives the REAL onboarding flow: Select Provider screen → Anonymous Access toggle → tap RuTor.info → Continue button (rendered because Phase 1.5 UI gate sees supportsAnonymous=true && anonymousMode=true) → tap Continue → main app's Search tab with 'Search history' empty state.

rehearsal.baseline_outcome: BUILD SUCCESSFUL — Finished 1 tests on CZ_API34_Phone(AVD) - 14
rehearsal.mutation: in core/tracker/rutor/src/main/kotlin/lava/tracker/rutor/RuTorDescriptor.kt: revert `override val supportsAnonymous: Boolean = true` to `false`
rehearsal.mutation_outcome: BUILD FAILED — androidx.compose.ui.test.ComposeTimeoutException: Condition still not satisfied after 5000 ms (the Continue button never renders because Phase 1.5 UI gate suppresses it when supportsAnonymous=false; the test cannot find 'Continue' within the timeout)
rehearsal.reverted_outcome: BUILD SUCCESSFUL on re-run after the mutation was reverted

production_changes_co_shipped: feature/login/src/main/kotlin/lava/login/ProviderLoginScreen.kt: added `Modifier.testTag(AnonymousAccessSwitchTestTag)` to the Anonymous Access Switch + `const val AnonymousAccessSwitchTestTag = "anonymous_access_switch"` so the test can target it without coordinate-based input.

feature/login/src/main/kotlin/lava/login/ProviderLoginScreen.kt: Phase 1.5 UI gate — `if (provider.authType == "NONE" || (state.anonymousMode && provider.supportsAnonymous))` instead of just `state.anonymousMode`. Without this gate the Continue button would have rendered for non-anonymous-capable providers too (RuTracker CAPTCHA_LOGIN, Kinozal/NNM-Club FORM_LOGIN), and the bypass would have failed silently in the ViewModel.

scope_limits.what_test_does_NOT_assert: Test stops at the main app's Search-history empty state. It does NOT search rutor.info or assert on result rows. Reasons: (a) real-network search is slow + flaky for tests, (b) the search-result assertion is C4's job (which has its own redesign owed). The Continue path was the IA-bug forensic anchor; closing it was the priority.
scope_limits.anti_bluff_note: C3 is NOT a bluff. It exercises the real onboarding flow + the Phase-1.5 UI gate + the Phase-1 layer-3 AuthService bridge. The deliberate-mutation (supportsAnonymous=false) reveals all three points in a coherent failure mode.

matrix_run_owed: Single-AVD rehearsal on CZ_API34_Phone (API 34). Per clause 6.I, the gating matrix run requires API 28, 30, 34, latest-stable, and at least one tablet form factor.
